name: Coffee-Soy Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, blend together the brown sugar and cornstarch.
2. Add the coffee, soy sauce, and vinegar to the saucepan.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Cook the mixture over low heat, stirring continuously.
5. Stir the mixture until it thickens and becomes bubbly.
6. Use the glaze to baste spareribs or pork chops during the last 15 minutes of barbequing.
7. The recipe makes about 1 cup of sauce.
